name: testElementsOfEditBusinessUnitDialog
description: Verify that all elements of dialog are displayed properly
descriptionHtml: Verify that all elements of dialog are displayed properly

steps.name: Login to the site as 'System admin' with '0825.005113.24.super@email.com'
Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Verify that all elements of dialog are displayed properly

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' in the Header
Verify: the header contains the expected title text
Verify: Company name is pre-filled correctly
Verify: Company name field is read-only
Verify: all labels are correct for each field
Click on the 'Close' button to close form
Verify: Dialog 'Edit business unit' is not displayed after clicking on the 'Close' button
Click on the 'Close' icon to close form
Verify: Dialog 'Edit business unit' is not displayed after clicking on the 'Close' icon
